sentences.target: J'ai oublié mon masque dans le bus.
sentences.reading: /ʒe ublije mɔ̃ mask dɑ̃ lə bys/

translations.fr: J'ai oublié mon masque dans le bus.
translations.ipa: /ʒe ublije mɔ̃ mask dɑ̃ lə bys/
translations.en: I forgot my mask on the bus.
translations.es: Olvidé mi mascarilla en el autobús.
translations.de: Ich habe meine Maske im Bus vergessen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把口罩忘在公交车上了。
translations.yue: 我喺巴士度遺低咗個口罩。
translations.vi: Tôi quên khẩu trang trên xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn mondkapje in de bus vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув свою маску в автобусі.
translations.hi: मैं बस में अपना मास्क भूल गया.
translations.el: Ξέχασα τη μάσκα μου στο λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: Jeg glemte munnbindet mitt på bussen.
translations.id: Saya lupa masker saya di bus.
translations.sv: Jag glömde mitt munskydd på bussen.
translations.da: Jeg glemte mit mundbind i bussen.
translations.ja: バスにマスクを置き忘れました。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; elided before a vowel.
Auxiliary in present indicative (1st person singular) used to form a compound tense.
Past participle of the lexical verb; combined with the auxiliary to make the passé composé.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, masculine singular) modifying 'masque'.
Common noun masculine singular; direct object of 'oublié'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article masculine singular; determines 'bus'.
Common noun masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Ce masque hydrate bien ma peau.

translations.fr: Ce masque hydrate bien ma peau.
translations.en: This mask moisturizes my skin well.
translations.es: Esta mascarilla hidrata bien mi piel.
translations.de: Diese Maske spendet meiner Haut viel Feuchtigkeit.
translations.it: Questa maschera idrata bene la mia pelle.
translations.ko: 이 마스크팩은 제 피부를 잘 보습해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个面膜很滋润我的皮肤。
translations.yue: 呢款面膜令我啲皮膚好保濕。
translations.ru: Эта маска хорошо увлажняет мою кожу.
translations.pt: Esta máscara hidrata bem a minha pele.
translations.he: המסכה הזו מעניקה לחות טובה לעור שלי.
translations.vi: Mặt nạ này dưỡng ẩm da tôi rất tốt.
translations.nl: Dit masker hydrateert mijn huid goed.
translations.uk: Ця маска добре зволожує мою шкіру.
translations.hu: Ez a maszk jól hidratálja a bőrömet.
translations.hi: यह मास्क मेरी त्वचा को अच्छी तरह नमी देता है.
translations.pl: Ta maseczka dobrze nawilża moją skórę.
translations.el: Αυτή η μάσκα ενυδατώνει καλά το δέρμα μου.
translations.nb: Denne masken fukter huden min godt.
translations.id: Masker ini melembapkan kulit saya dengan baik.
translations.sv: Den här masken återfuktar min hud bra.
translations.ro: Această mască îmi hidratează bine pielea.
translations.cs: Tato maska dobře hydratuje mou pleť.
translations.da: Denne maske fugter min hud godt.
translations.ja: このマスクは肌をしっかり保湿してくれます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'masque'.
Common noun masculine singular; subject of 'hydrate'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); agrees with 'masque'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, feminine singular) modifying 'peau'.
Common noun feminine singular; direct object of 'hydrate'.

sentences.target: On enlève le masque dehors maintenant.

translations.fr: On enlève le masque dehors maintenant.
translations.en: We take the mask off outside now.
translations.es: Ahora nos quitamos la mascarilla en exteriores.
translations.de: Draußen nehmen wir die Maske jetzt ab.
translations.zh-Hans: 现在我们在户外摘下口罩。
translations.yue: 而家喺戶外我哋會除口罩。
translations.ru: Теперь мы снимаем маску на улице.
translations.pt: Agora tiramos a máscara ao ar livre.
translations.he: עכשיו אנחנו מורידים את המסכה בחוץ.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng tôi tháo khẩu trang khi ở ngoài trời.
translations.ar: نحن نزيل الكمامة في الخارج עכשיו.
translations.nl: Buiten doen we het mondkapje nu af.
translations.uk: Тепер ми знімаємо маску на вулиці.
translations.hi: अब हम बाहर मास्क उतारते हैं.
translations.nb: Nå tar vi av munnbindet utendørs.
translations.id: Sekarang kami melepas masker saat di luar.
translations.sv: Nu tar vi av munskyddet utomhus.
translations.da: Nu tager vi mundbindet af udenfor.
translations.ja: 今は外でマスクを外します。

tokens.explanation: Generic personal pronoun used as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); agrees with 'on'.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'masque'.
Common noun masculine singular; direct object of 'enlève'.
Adverb of place.
Temporal adverb.

sentences.target: Je cherche un masque pour la peinture.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ mask puʁ la pɛ̃tyʁ/

translations.fr: Je cherche un masque pour la peinture.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ mask puʁ la pɛ̃tyʁ/
translations.en: I'm looking for a mask for painting.
translations.de: Ich suche eine Atemschutzmaske zum Streichen.
translations.yue: 我搵緊一個油漆用嘅口罩。
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma máscara para pintar.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một chiếc khẩu trang để sơn.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een masker om te schilderen.
translations.hi: मैं पेंटिंग के लिए एक मास्क ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en maske til maling.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en mask för målning.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en maske til maling.
translations.ja: 塗装用のマスクを探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular).
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determining 'masque'.
Common noun masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement.
Definite article feminine singular; determines 'peinture'.
Common noun feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

Ce masque hydrate bien ma peau.
On enlève le masque dehors maintenant.
Je cherche un masque pour la peinture.

This mask moisturizes my skin well.
We take the mask off outside now.
I'm looking for a mask for painting.
